mapper.select: SELECT database_id AS databaseId, last_vacuum AS lastVacuum, last_autovacuum AS lastAutovacuum, dead_tuple_total AS deadTuples, n_mod_since_analyze AS modSinceAnalyze, bloat_bytes AS bloatBytes, bloat_ratio AS bloatRatio, vacuum_count_24h AS vacuumCount24h, autovacuum_count_24h AS autovacuumCount24h FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE collected_at BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} AND database_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(vacuum_count_24h + autovacuum_count_24h), 0) FROM vacuum_trend_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '${hours} hours'
